description: A formal letter issued by an employer documenting the end of an employee's employment.

employee_name.instruction: The full name of the employee whose employment is ending.

employer_name.instruction: The name of the company or organization terminating the employment.

job_title.instruction: The employee's role or position at the time of termination.

employment_start_date.instruction: The date the employee started working at the company.

employment_end_date.instruction: The date the employee's employment ended.

termination_reason.instruction: The reason the employment ended, such as layoff, resignation, or reduction in hours.

issuer_name.instruction: The name of the person who issued or signed the termination letter.

issuer_title.instruction: The job title of the person issuing the termination letter.

letter_date.instruction: The date the termination letter was issued.
